Event.info: [chrome-mal-ids] Krebs/Nguyen May 2021 fake brand extension network — 11 malicious extension(s)

Attribute.comment: Name: Adobe Lightroom (fake, variant 2) | Threat: phishing,fake-extension,credential-theft | Krebs/Nguyen May 2021 fake brand extension network. 45 extensions spoofed Adobe, Amazon, CBS, FITE, HBO, IMVU, Microsoft, Ring, Roku. Prompted users for personal/financial data. Network of fake Google
